requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920, IEC 61000 Series, Harmonics, and Weak-Grid Performance for Guinea PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——几内亚光伏逆变器IEC 62920、IEC 61000系列、谐波和弱电网性能
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——幾內亞光伏逆變器IEC 62920、IEC 61000系列、諧波和弱電網性能

summary.en: A public Guinea solar-inverter EMC technical regulation could not be confirmed. For grid-tied and donor-financed PV projects, the defensible evidence package is IEC 62920 for PV power-conversion EMC, IEC 61000-series immunity and emission reports, harmonic current and voltage-distortion analysis, and site-level power-quality modelling. Guinea's grid context can include weak feeders, hydro-dominated supply in parts of the system, thermal generation, industrial and mining loads, rural mini-grids, high humidity, salt exposure near Conakry, and Harmattan dust inland; EMC and power-quality acceptance should therefore be tied to the actual site and EDG or project-owner criteria.
summary.zh: 未能确认公开的几内亚太阳能逆变器EMC技术法规。对于并网和捐助方融资光伏项目，较稳妥的证据包包括：光伏功率变换设备EMC的IEC 62920、IEC 61000系列抗扰度和发射报告、谐波电流和电压畸变分析，以及现场级电能质量建模。几内亚电网环境可能包括弱馈线、部分系统以水电为主、热电、工业和矿业负荷、农村微电网、湿度高、科纳克里附近盐雾以及内陆哈马丹粉尘；因此EMC和电能质量接受应与实际现场及EDG或项目业主标准绑定。
summary.zht: 未能確認公開的幾內亞太陽能逆變器EMC技術法規。對於併網和捐助方融資光伏項目，較穩妥的證據包包括：光伏功率轉換設備EMC的IEC 62920、IEC 61000系列抗擾度和發射報告、諧波電流和電壓畸變分析，以及現場級電能品質建模。幾內亞電網環境可能包括弱饋線、部分系統以水電為主、熱電、工業和礦業負荷、農村微電網、濕度高、科納克里附近鹽霧以及內陸哈馬丹粉塵；因此EMC和電能品質接受應與實際現場及EDG或項目業主標準綁定。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emissions, immunity, harmonics, voltage fluctuation, and power-quality test methods where specified
Project-specific EDG, EPC, lender, donor, or owner power-quality limits and commissioning tests
Site environmental assumptions for humidity, corrosion, dust, ventilation, and thermal derating

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is commonly assessed under GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic test plans, with reports issued by CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports may reference IEC 61000-series methods but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62920 or project-specific power-quality evidence for Guinea. The export package may need IEC-labelled reports, full test configurations, harmonic study data, and confirmation that firmware settings and filters remain valid under Guinea's 50 Hz connection conditions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC通常依据GB/T 37408-2021及相关国内测试方案评估，并由CNAS认可实验室出具报告。上述报告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但不会自动被接受为几内亚的IEC 62920或项目特定电能质量证据。出口包可能需要IEC标识报告、完整测试配置、谐波研究数据，以及确认固件设置和滤波器在几内亚50 Hz接入条件下仍然有效。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC通常依據GB/T 37408-2021及相關國內測試方案評估，並由CNAS認可實驗室出具報告。上述報告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但不會自動被接受為幾內亞的IEC 62920或項目特定電能品質證據。出口包可能需要IEC標識報告、完整測試配置、諧波研究數據，以及確認韌體設置和濾波器在幾內亞50 Hz接入條件下仍然有效。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T EMC reports alone do not prove IEC 62920 compliance or site power-quality acceptance in Guinea. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model and configuration, prepare harmonic and flicker evidence for the project capacity, and confirm EDG or owner limits for total harmonic distortion, reactive power control, grounding, earthing, surge protection, and communication interference. Environmental controls such as conformal coating, IP rating, enclosure ventilation, salt-mist exposure, and dust filters should be documented where relevant.
gap.zh: 差距：仅有GB/T EMC报告不能证明几内亚IEC 62920合规或现场电能质量接受。出口商应针对确切逆变器型号和配置取得IEC 62920 / IEC 61000报告，为项目容量准备谐波和闪变证据，并确认EDG或业主关于总谐波畸变、无功控制、接地、防雷浪涌保护和通信干扰的限值。涉及环境控制时，应记录三防漆、IP等级、机柜通风、盐雾暴露和防尘滤网。
gap.zht: 差距：僅有GB/T EMC報告不能證明幾內亞IEC 62920合規或現場電能品質接受。出口商應針對確切逆變器型號和配置取得IEC 62920 / IEC 61000報告，為項目容量準備諧波和閃變證據，並確認EDG或業主關於總諧波畸變、無功控制、接地、防雷浪湧保護和通信干擾的限值。涉及環境控制時，應記錄三防漆、IP等級、機櫃通風、鹽霧暴露和防塵濾網。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by EDG, EPC, project-owner, lender, donor, procurement, or commissioning specifications; public Guinea inverter-specific EMC regulation not confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven under Chinese PV inverter certification routes; not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 evidence for Guinea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume China GB/T 37408 EMC evidence will satisfy Guinea project acceptance. Use IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 reports, harmonic studies, EDG or owner power-quality limits, and tropical environmental controls as the working package until the current Guinea-specific EMC route is confirmed. Verify final requirements with EDG, the EPC, lender, donor, and competent national conformity body.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假设中国GB/T 37408 EMC证据可满足几内亚项目接受。除非现行几内亚特定EMC路径得到确认，否则应以IEC 62920 / IEC 61000报告、谐波研究、EDG或业主电能质量限值及热带环境控制作为工作包。请向EDG、EPC、贷款方、捐助方和主管国家合格评定机构核实最终要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假設中國GB/T 37408 EMC證據可滿足幾內亞項目接受。除非現行幾內亞特定EMC路徑得到確認，否則應以IEC 62920 / IEC 61000報告、諧波研究、EDG或業主電能品質限值及熱帶環境控制作為工作包。請向EDG、EPC、貸款方、捐助方和主管國家合格評定機構核實最終要求。
